wins: Announced acquisition of GIP, creating a $150 billion infrastructure platform
Generated $289 billion in total net inflows in 2023
Achieved 6% annualized organic base fee growth in November and December 2023
Strong performance fees increased from a year ago
BlackRock's ETF net inflows of $186 billion in 2023
risks: Full year operating income declined 2% from 2022
Nonoperating results included $122 million of net investment income
Fourth quarter restructuring charge of $61 million
Uncertainty around tax legislation impacting effective tax rate
Potential outflows from rising rate sensitive strategies
